TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Gong_Yoo, title = Gong_Yoo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gong_Yoo} }

S.FORM: == Kong Liu == u siwkay niza Kong Liu(1979.7.10),nuyaan a ngangan sa ci Kong Tice. nalecuhan i Chawsin sabul. u palaway atu matol nu Korea kanatal. zayhan adidi' ku kidu niza, sisa sizuma a ngangan ci SiaoTou (adidi'ay a lala). 2001 a mihca, tahkal tu ciniza mipalaw. 2007 a mihca mipalaw i tilibi, singangan tuway. 2016 a mihca, yadah ku iga niza, kapah pacakay. tinaku ku iga"caykapaedep a sapangangaw關不住的誘惑","sipatayay a kasulin失速列車","mitan密探".u tilibi sa "sinaadaay a Dietu ",mipalaw ciniza ku Dietu, caay kapatayay a dietu. paacawa ci acawana nu Dietu -ci Zho En Chi. manamuh ku binawlan tu tina tilibi a palaw. aluman ku tayza miazihay a tademaw. (amicunus henay tu sulit.待補充) u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam 孔劉(韓語:공유,1979年7月10日－), "꽁(GGong)" MBC . u sulit nu Amilika Gong Ji-chul (Hangul: 공지철; born July 10, 1979), better known by his stage name Gong Yoo , is a South Korean actor. He is 185 cm tall. He is best known for his roles in television dramas The 1st Shop of Coffee Prince (2007) and Guardian: The Lonely and Great God (2016-2017), and the films Silenced(2011), The Age of Shadows (2016), and Train to Busan (2016). u sulit nu Lipun キム・ゴウン(김고은,Kim Go Eun,1991年7月2日 - )は韓国の俳優. u kawlah niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.待補充) u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.待補充)
S.PHON: == koŋ r~ɾiu == u siwkaj niza koŋ r~ɾiu(****.*.**),nujaan a ŋaŋan sa ʦi koŋ tiʦə. nar~ɾəʦuħan i ʦħawsin sabur~ɾ. u par~ɾawaj atu mator~ɾ nu korəa kanatar~ɾ. zajħan adidiʔ~ʡ ku kidu niza, sisa sizuma a ŋaŋan ʦi siaotou (adidiʔ~ʡaj a r~ɾar~ɾa). **** a miħʦa, taħkar~ɾ tu ʦiniza mipar~ɾaw. **** a miħʦa mipar~ɾaw i tir~ɾibi, siŋaŋan tuwaj. **** a miħʦa, jadaħ ku iga niza, kapaħ paʦakaj. tinaku ku iga"ʦajkapaədəp a sapaŋaŋaw******","sipatajaj a kasur~ɾin****","mitan**".u tir~ɾibi sa "sinaadaaj a diətu ",mipar~ɾaw ʦiniza ku diətu, ʦaaj kapatajaj a diətu. paaʦawa ʦi aʦawana nu diətu -ʦi zħo ən ʦħi. manamuħ ku binawr~ɾan tu tina tir~ɾibi a par~ɾaw. ar~ɾuman ku tajza miaziħaj a tadəmaw. (amiʦunus ħənaj tu sur~ɾit.***) u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam **(**:**,***********), "*(ggoŋ)" mbʦ . u sur~ɾit nu amir~ɾika goŋ *i-ʦħur~ɾ (ħaŋur~ɾ: ***; born *ur~ɾj **, ****), bəttər known bj ħis stagə namə goŋ joo , is a soutħ korəan aʦtor. ħə is *** ʦm tar~ɾr~ɾ. ħə is bəst known for ħis ror~ɾəs in tər~ɾə*ision dramas tħə *st sħop of ʦoffəə prinʦə (****) and guardian: tħə r~ɾonər~ɾj and grəat god (****-****), and tħə fir~ɾms sir~ɾənʦəd(****), tħə agə of sħadows (****), and train to busan (****). u sur~ɾit nu r~ɾipun ******(***,kim go əun,********* - )******. u kawr~ɾaħ niza (amiʦunus ħənaj tu sur~ɾit.***) u uzip niza (amiʦunus ħənaj tu sur~ɾit.***)
S.FORM: == Kong Liu == u siwkay niza Kong Liu(1979.7.10),nuyaan a ngangan sa ci Kong Tice. nalecuhan i Chawsin sabul. u palaway atu matol nu Korea kanatal. zayhan adidi' ku kidu niza, sisa sizuma a ngangan ci SiaoTou (adidi'ay a lala). 2001 a mihca, tahkal tu ciniza mipalaw. 2007 a mihca mipalaw i tilibi, singangan tuway. 2016 a mihca, yadah ku iga niza, kapah pacakay. tinaku ku iga"caykapaedep a sapangangaw關不住的誘惑","sipatayay a kasulin失速列車","mitan密探".u tilibi sa "sinaadaay a Dietu ",mipalaw ciniza ku Dietu, caay kapatayay a dietu. paacawa ci acawana nu Dietu -ci Zho En Chi. manamuh ku binawlan tu tina tilibi a palaw. aluman ku tayza miazihay a tademaw. (amicunus henay tu sulit.待補充) u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam 孔劉(韓語:공유,1979年7月10日－), "꽁(GGong)" MBC . u sulit nu Amilika Gong Ji-chul (Hangul: 공지철; born July 10, 1979), better known by his stage name Gong Yoo , is a South Korean actor. He is 185 cm tall. He is best known for his roles in television dramas The 1st Shop of Coffee Prince (2007) and Guardian: The Lonely and Great God (2016-2017), and the films Silenced(2011), The Age of Shadows (2016), and Train to Busan (2016). u sulit nu Lipun キム・ゴウン(김고은,Kim Go Eun,1991年7月2日 - )は韓国の俳優. u kawlah niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.待補充) u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.待補充)
S.PHON: == koŋ r~ɾiu == u siwkaj niza koŋ r~ɾiu(****.*.**),nujaan a ŋaŋan sa ʦi koŋ tiʦə. nar~ɾəʦuħan i ʦħawsin sabur~ɾ. u par~ɾawaj atu mator~ɾ nu korəa kanatar~ɾ. zajħan adidiʔ~ʡ ku kidu niza, sisa sizuma a ŋaŋan ʦi siaotou (adidiʔ~ʡaj a r~ɾar~ɾa). **** a miħʦa, taħkar~ɾ tu ʦiniza mipar~ɾaw. **** a miħʦa mipar~ɾaw i tir~ɾibi, siŋaŋan tuwaj. **** a miħʦa, jadaħ ku iga niza, kapaħ paʦakaj. tinaku ku iga"ʦajkapaədəp a sapaŋaŋaw******","sipatajaj a kasur~ɾin****","mitan**".u tir~ɾibi sa "sinaadaaj a diətu ",mipar~ɾaw ʦiniza ku diətu, ʦaaj kapatajaj a diətu. paaʦawa ʦi aʦawana nu diətu -ʦi zħo ən ʦħi. manamuħ ku binawr~ɾan tu tina tir~ɾibi a par~ɾaw. ar~ɾuman ku tajza miaziħaj a tadəmaw. (amiʦunus ħənaj tu sur~ɾit.***) u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~ɾit nu ħur~ɾam **(**:**,***********), "*(ggoŋ)" mbʦ . u sur~ɾit nu amir~ɾika goŋ *i-ʦħur~ɾ (ħaŋur~ɾ: ***; born *ur~ɾj **, ****), bəttər known bj ħis stagə namə goŋ joo , is a soutħ korəan aʦtor. ħə is *** ʦm tar~ɾr~ɾ. ħə is bəst known for ħis ror~ɾəs in tər~ɾə*ision dramas tħə *st sħop of ʦoffəə prinʦə (****) and guardian: tħə r~ɾonər~ɾj and grəat god (****-****), and tħə fir~ɾms sir~ɾənʦəd(****), tħə agə of sħadows (****), and train to busan (****). u sur~ɾit nu r~ɾipun ******(***,kim go əun,********* - )******. u kawr~ɾaħ niza (amiʦunus ħənaj tu sur~ɾit.***) u uzip niza (amiʦunus ħənaj tu sur~ɾit.***)
